body: You can apply whether you're in work or not, as long as you live in Scotland, you or your partner are the main person looking after a child who's under 16 years old, and you or your partner are getting one of the qualifying benefits, such as Universal Credit. Child Benefit on its own is not an accepted benefit.
citation_label: mygov.scot Scottish Child Payment: who should apply
heading: Scottish Child Payment: Who should apply
legal_identifier: mygov.scot Scottish Child Payment: who should apply
